sections.paragraph: m., Isa 34:13, קִימֹושׁ Hos 9:6 and plur. קִמְּשֹׁנִים Pro 24:31, a useless, thorny plant, such as the nettle or thistle, Celsii Hierob. t. ii. p. 206. The Arab. root قمش is to bring together; especially to collect small things upon the ground; but this noun has perhaps some other origin. [See קָמַשׁ .]
